mapper.insert: insert into community_suggestion (suggestion_id, user_id, user_name, user_phone, title, content, images, status, handle_user_id, handle_user_name, handle_result, handle_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values (#{suggestionId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{title}, #{content}, #{images}, #{status}, #{handleUserId}, #{handleUserName}, #{handleResult}, #{handleTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update community_suggestion set user_id = #{userId}, user_name = #{userName}, user_phone = #{userPhone}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, images = #{images}, status = #{status}, handle_user_id = #{handleUserId}, handle_user_name = #{handleUserName}, handle_result = #{handleResult}, handle_time = #{handleTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where suggestion_id = #{suggestionId}
